holdings.infoBox: NUDM is an equity ETF with a total of 152 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 4.96%, Novartis AG at 2.50%, Siemens Aktiengesellschaft at 2.29%, Tokyo Electron at 2.21%, and SoftBank Group at 2.07%.

overview.description: The Nuveen ESG International Developed Markets Equity ETF (NUDM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Nuveen ESG International DM index. The fund tracks an index of companies from developed countries, excluding the US and Canada, that align with various environmental, social, and governance principles. NUDM was launched on Jun 7, 2017 and is issued by Nuveen.
